scope: B group second-round score, 1X2 probabilities, odds comparison, conditional betting leans, and table implications.

sources.name: OddsChecker
supports: public odds snapshot and market direction

market_snapshot.market_note: Model is materially lower than market on Switzerland single win.

rationale: Switzerland still have better structure and control.
First-round 1-1 against Qatar forces a downgrade to Swiss control-to-goal conversion.
Bosnia's box presence, target forwards and set pieces raise draw and handicap paths.
B group draw baseline was raised after two first-round draws.
conditional_betting_lean: Bosnia +1 or +1.25 preferred to Bosnia outright

market_snapshot.market_note: Market is much higher on Canada single win than the model; Canada remains the pick but price is short.

rationale: Canada's home setting, speed and pressing make this the clearest favorite spot in B round two.
Davies absence still discounts Canada's left-side progression.
Qatar's first-round draw with Switzerland raises low-block and Afif variance.
If Canada score first, Qatar will be forced out and Canada transition lanes improve.
conditional_betting_lean: Canada moneyline is too short to chase
Qatar +1.5 can protect against Canada narrow win

projected_table_if_predictions_hit.note: two draws; must push in final round

validation_targets.market_probability_sums: normalized references sum to 100 within rounding tolerance
known_limitations: injury and suspension data require final refresh
odds snapshots are public references, not guaranteed live best price
